title: QBR data story deck
description: Create an executive QBR deck from operating metrics.

question.query: Create a 10-12 slide QBR deck for executives using the attached operating metrics. Highlight growth, retention risk, funnel efficiency, and next-quarter actions. Include at least two charts, one summary table, and a clear recommendation section.
question.query_chinese: 使用附件中的运营指标，为高管制作一份 10-12 页的 QBR PPT。突出增长、留存风险、漏斗效率和下一季度行动。至少包含两个图表、一个摘要表格，以及一个清晰的建议部分。

attachments.name: qbr_metrics.csv
attachments.description: Quarterly ARR, churn, NRR, pipeline, conversion, and segment metrics.

metadata.promotion_criteria: Promote to regression after three consecutive pass^3 runs across two model versions.
